---
title: "Loading"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
---

```{r }
library(tidyverse)
library(haven)
library(Hmisc)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(plm)

pathsoep <- file.path(getwd(), "soepdata")

```

```{r }
# ==============================================================================
# Load and prepare PPATHL 
# ==============================================================================

ppathl <- readRDS(paste0(pathsoep, "/", "ppathl.rds"))

ppathl <- ppathl %>%
  select(
    pid, hid, syear,
    netto, pop,
    sex, gebjahr, partner, migback,
    psample, todjahr
  ) %>%
  filter(
    syear >= 2002 & syear <= 2023,
    pop %in% c(1, 2)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    interviewed = netto >= 10 & netto <= 19 
  ) %>%
  select(-netto, -pop) %>%
  arrange(pid, syear)

```

```{r }
# ==============================================================================
# Load and prepare HEALTH data
# ==============================================================================

health <- readRDS(paste0(pathsoep, "/", "health.rds"))

health <- health %>%
  select(pid, syear, 
         mcs, pcs, 
         height, fheight, 
         weight, fweight, 
         bmi,
         pf_nbs, rp_nbs, bp_nbs, gh_nbs, vt_nbs, sf_nbs, re_nbs, mh_nbs) %>%
  filter(syear >= 2002 & syear <= 2023) %>%
  arrange(pid, syear)
```


```{r }
# ==============================================================================
# Load and prepare GRIPSTR (Grip Strength) data
# ==============================================================================

gripstr <- readRDS(paste0(pathsoep, "/", "gripstr.rds"))

gripstr <- gripstr %>%
  select(pid, syear, 
         gs01, gs02, gs03, gs04, gs05, gs06, gs07) %>%
  filter(syear >= 2002 & syear <= 2023) %>%
  # Exclude observations with test procedure variations
  filter(gs07 != 1 | is.na(gs07)) %>%
  # Calculate maximum grip strength
  mutate(
    grip_right_max = pmax(gs03, gs04, na.rm = TRUE),
    grip_left_max = pmax(gs05, gs06, na.rm = TRUE),
    grip_max = pmax(grip_right_max, grip_left_max, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  select(pid, syear, gs01, gs02, grip_right_max, grip_left_max, grip_max) %>%
  arrange(pid, syear)

```

```{r }
# ==============================================================================
# Load and prepare PL (Personal) data
# ==============================================================================

pl <- readRDS(paste0(pathsoep, "/", "pl.rds"))

pl <- pl %>%
  select(pid, hid, syear, sample1, ple0010_h) %>%
  filter(syear >= 2002 & syear <= 2023) %>%
  arrange(hid, pid, syear)
```

```{r }
# ==============================================================================
# Load and prepare PGEN (Generated Personal) data
# ==============================================================================

pgen <- readRDS(paste0(pathsoep, "/", "pgen.rds"))

pgen <- pgen %>%
  select(pid, hid, syear, 
         pgpartz, pgemplst, pglabgro, pglabnet, 
         pgjobch, pgtatzeit, pgbilzeit, pgmode) %>%
  filter(syear >= 2002 & syear <= 2023) %>%
  arrange(pid, syear)
```

```{r }
# ==============================================================================
# Merge all datasets
# ==============================================================================

# Start with ppathl as base
d <- ppathl

# Join health data
d <- left_join(d, health, by = c("pid", "syear"))
rm(health)

# Join grip strength data
d <- left_join(d, gripstr, by = c("pid", "syear"))
rm(gripstr)

# Join pl data
d <- left_join(d, pl, by = c("pid", "hid", "syear"))
rm(pl)

# Join pgen data
d <- left_join(d, pgen, by = c("pid", "hid", "syear"))
rm(pgen, ppathl)
```

```{r }
# ==============================================================================
# Data cleaning and variable creation
# ==============================================================================

# Remove value labels
d <- d %>% zap_labels() %>% zap_label()

# Flag known death with unknown year before recoding
d$maybe_dead <- ifelse(d$todjahr == -2, 1, 0)

# Recode SOEP missing values (-9 to -1) to NA
numeric_cols <- sapply(d, is.numeric)
d[, numeric_cols] <- lapply(d[, numeric_cols], function(x) {
  x[x %in% seq(-9, -1, 1)] <- NA
  x
})

# Create age variable
d$age <- d$syear - d$gebjahr

# Alternative: use ple0010_h if available
d$age <- ifelse(is.na(d$age) & !is.na(d$ple0010_h), 
                d$syear - d$ple0010_h, 
                d$age)


# Create female dummy variable
d$female <- ifelse(d$sex == 2, 1, 0)
d$female <- factor(d$female,
                   levels = c(0, 1),
                   labels = c("Men", "Women"))
```

```{r }
# ==============================================================================
# Filter observations
# ==============================================================================

# Check for height/weight flags and create clean variables
d <- d %>%
  mutate(
    height_clean = ifelse(fheight > 0 | is.na(fheight), NA, height),
    weight_clean = ifelse(fweight > 0 | is.na(fweight), NA, weight)
  )

# Winsorize labor income (top and bottom 0.5%)
if(sum(!is.na(d$pglabgro)) > 0) {
  d <- d %>% 
    mutate(
      pglabgro_win = ifelse(
        !is.na(pglabgro) & 
        pglabgro > quantile(pglabgro, 0.005, na.rm = TRUE) &
        pglabgro < quantile(pglabgro, 0.995, na.rm = TRUE),
        pglabgro, NA
      )
    )
}

# Forward-fill health variables within each person
d <- d %>%
  group_by(pid) %>%
  arrange(pid, syear) %>%
  mutate(
    # Forward-fill health variables
    mcs = zoo::na.locf(mcs, na.rm = FALSE),
    pcs = zoo::na.locf(pcs, na.rm = FALSE),
    bmi = zoo::na.locf(bmi, na.rm = FALSE),
    grip_max = zoo::na.locf(grip_max, na.rm = FALSE),
    # Forward-fill height and weight
    height = zoo::na.locf(height, na.rm = FALSE),
    fheight = zoo::na.locf(fheight, na.rm = FALSE),
    weight = zoo::na.locf(weight, na.rm = FALSE),
    fweight = zoo::na.locf(fweight, na.rm = FALSE),
    # Do the same for all health variables
    across(c(pf_nbs, rp_nbs, bp_nbs, gh_nbs, vt_nbs, sf_nbs, re_nbs, mh_nbs),
           ~zoo::na.locf(., na.rm = FALSE))
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

```


```{r }
# ==============================================================================
# Define Attrition: Last obs year, not incl 2023 or when last year is death
# ==============================================================================

d <- d %>%
  arrange(pid, syear) %>%
  group_by(pid) %>%
  mutate(
    last_obs_year = max(syear),
    death_year = max(todjahr, na.rm = TRUE),
    attrition = as.integer(syear == last_obs_year & 
                          last_obs_year < 2023 &
                          (is.na(death_year) | last_obs_year != death_year))
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

```



```{r }
# ==============================================================================
# Variable availability by year
# ==============================================================================

# Function to check which years each variable has data
check_variable_years <- function(data, vars) {
  results <- list()
  
  for(var in vars) {
    if(var %in% names(data)) {
      years_available <- data %>%
        filter(!is.na(.data[[var]])) %>%
        group_by(syear) %>%
        summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
        filter(n > 0) %>%
        pull(syear)
      
      results[[var]] <- list(
        variable = var,
        years = paste(years_available, collapse = ", "),
        n_years = length(years_available),
        first_year = ifelse(length(years_available) > 0, min(years_available), NA),
        last_year = ifelse(length(years_available) > 0, max(years_available), NA),
        total_obs = sum(!is.na(data[[var]]))
      )
    } else {
      results[[var]] <- list(
        variable = var,
        years = "Variable not found",
        n_years = 0,
        first_year = NA,
        last_year = NA,
        total_obs = 0
      )
    }
  }
  
  # Convert to data frame
  bind_rows(results)
}

# Check health variables
health_vars_list <- c("mcs", "pcs", "bmi", "height", "weight",
                      "pf_nbs", "rp_nbs", "bp_nbs", "gh_nbs",
                      "vt_nbs", "sf_nbs", "re_nbs", "mh_nbs",
                      "grip_max", "grip_right_max", "grip_left_max")

cat("\n=== Health Variables Availability ===\n")
health_availability <- check_variable_years(d, health_vars_list)
print(kable(health_availability, 
            caption = "Health Variables by Year") %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position", "striped")))


# Check socioeconomic variables
socio_vars_list <- c("age", "pglabgro", "pglabnet",
                     "pgtatzeit", "pgbilzeit", "pgemplst", "pgpartz")

cat("\n=== Socioeconomic Variables Availability ===\n")
socio_availability <- check_variable_years(d, socio_vars_list)
print(kable(socio_availability,
            caption = "Socioeconomic Variables by Year") %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position", "striped")))

```

```{r }
# ==============================================================================
# Panel structure analysis
# ==============================================================================

# Number of unique individuals
num_panels <- d %>% summarise(num_panels = n_distinct(pid)) %>% pull(num_panels)

# Number of unique time periods
num_times <- d %>% summarise(num_times = n_distinct(syear)) %>% pull(num_times)

# Total number of observations
total_obs <- nrow(d)

cat("\n=== Panel Structure ===\n")
cat("Number of individuals:", num_panels, "\n")
cat("Number of time periods:", num_times, "\n")
cat("Total observations:", total_obs, "\n")

# Observations per individual
obs_per_panel <- d %>%
  group_by(pid) %>%
  summarise(
    N_obs = n(),
    time_min = min(syear),
    time_max = max(syear),
    time_span = time_max - time_min + 1,
    N_time_periods = n_distinct(syear),
    has_gaps = N_time_periods < time_span
  )

cat("\nObservations per individual:\n")
print(summary(obs_per_panel$N_obs))

# Check if balanced
is_balanced <- length(unique(obs_per_panel$N_obs)) == 1 && all(!obs_per_panel$has_gaps)
cat("\nIs panel balanced?", is_balanced, "\n")

# Number of panels with gaps
num_panels_with_gaps <- sum(obs_per_panel$has_gaps)
cat("Number of individuals with gaps:", num_panels_with_gaps, "\n")


```


```{r }
# ==============================================================================
# Export cleaned data
# ==============================================================================

# Save as RDS
saveRDS(d, file.path(getwd(), "health_analysis_cleaned.rds"))

cat("\n=== Data preparation complete ===\n")
cat("Cleaned dataset saved as:", paste0("health_analysis_cleaned.rds"), "\n")
```
